commands.review_summary:
The branch lets ChatGPT browser model selection honor `--browser-model-strategy current` before requiring a picker button, improves the strict missing-picker diagnostic, and adds browser model-selection tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main returns `button-missing` before evaluating `MODEL_STRATEGY === 'current'`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the failing path is clear in the browser expression.
commands.review_followup: - No repair lane is needed because I found no discrete patch defect; this should proceed through normal maintainer review and check gating.

target.title: fix(browser): allow current model without picker
target.body:
Issue:
- In some synced ChatGPT profiles, the composer is available but no model picker button is present.
- `--browser-model-strategy current` still failed because model selection required the picker before honoring the strategy.
- Strict `select` failures only reported a generic missing-button error.

Fix:
- Honor `current` before requiring a model picker button.
- Keep `select` strict when the picker is absent.
- Include visible account/composer state and explicit `current`/`ignore` guidance in the missing-picker error.

Proof:
- `pnpm vitest run tests/browser/modelSelection.test.ts tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts tests/browser/thinkingTime.test.ts`
- `pnpm run build`
- selector-only live check: `current` returned unverified already-selected evidence without submitting a prompt
- selector-only live check: strict `select` failed with the account-state diagnostic and `--browser-model-strategy current` guidance

Note:
- `pnpm run typecheck` was attempted and failed on existing unrelated module/nullable-port errors outside this change.
target.author: m-rousseau
